details.productUrlName: Elrond Lord of Rivendell Showcase Scrolls

customAttributes.description: Whenever Elrond, Lord of Rivendell or another creature enter the battlefield under your control, scry 1. If this is the second time this ability has resolved this turn, the Ring tempts you.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 11/3/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: "This is the hour of the Shire-folk, when they arise from their quiet fields to shake the towers and counsels of the Great. Who of all the Wise could have foreseen it?"
